steps.title: Find the scale reduction
steps.content:
A side length 70% shorter means the new length is 30% of the original:
$$\text{New side} = 35 \times (1 - 0.70) = 35 \times 0.30 = 10.5 \text{ inches}$$
Linear reduction factor: $\frac{10.5}{35} = \frac{3}{10}$

steps.title: Apply the inverse scale relationship
steps.content:
When a map's physical dimensions shrink by a factor of $\frac{3}{10}$, the same region is represented on a smaller map, so each inch must cover more miles. The scale (miles per inch) increases by the inverse factor $\frac{10}{3}$.
$$\text{New scale} = 13 \times \frac{10}{3} = \frac{130}{3} \approx 43.33 \text{ miles per inch}$$

steps.title: Select the closest answer
steps.content: Compare 43.33 mi/in to each choice: A 3.90 is off by ~39; B 7.65 is off by ~36; C 24.50 is off by ~19; D 45.33 is off by ~2. D is closest. That matches choice D — D is correct.
